game_meta.name: Naraka: Bladepoint
game_meta.tagline: Martial-arts battle royale. Melee-focused with parkour + grappling hook.
game_meta.character_vocab: heroes (10+, each with unique active + ultimate skills)
game_meta.round_format: BR match ~20-30 minutes. Solo, duo, or trio modes.
key_mechanics: Melee timing — parry (blue), focus attack (red), grab break
Weapon types — sword, longsword, katana, polearm, dual halberds, greatsword
Sound design — listen for steps, weapon swings

holoroth.name: Holoroth
holoroth.notes: Larger trios map with more verticality.

Dueler.notes: Yoto Hime, Tarka Ji. Pure duel win-rate.

low: Spamming attack — eaten by parry every time
Bad grapple landing (out of stamina mid-fight)
mid: Wrong weapon for situation (greatsword in tight quarters)
high: Bad rotation away from final zone
Engaging duels when team is third-partying

review_template.style: Specific over generic. Reference visible HUD elements, in-game timers, and concrete tactical concepts. Never say "play smart" or "use abilities better".

vocabulary: standard tactical vocabulary varies by game; defer to game_meta.character_vocab and key_mechanics for terms
